T-1042.subject: Charged twice for the Pro plan this month
T-1042.body: Hi — I was billed 49 EUR twice on the 3rd. I only have one Pro subscription. Please refund the duplicate charge.

T-1043.subject: How do I export my data?
T-1043.body: Where in the dashboard can I export all my projects to CSV? I could not find it under Settings.
